calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: MECH-439 conflict-grade GAP-BLIND control-arm falsifier (gap-concentrated vs uniform lift, via arm contrast); supersedes V3-EXQ-689
items.note: MECH-439's FIRST falsifier, REDESIGNED (gap-BLIND control arms) per failure_autopsy_V3-EXQ-689_2026-06-19 (user-ratified S6). Same scientific question: does conflict-grading convert committed-action diversity, and is the lift gap-CONCENTRATED (real conflict-grading) vs UNIFORM (a bigger fixed shortlist / hotter flat softmax). 689 self-routed substrate_not_ready_requeue on the grading-non-vacuity gap-spread leg (gap_spread 0/3; F-gap pinned in the near-tie bin; the per-gap-bin C_FGAP regression uncomputable, a1b1_gap_bins_used=2<3). ADJUDICATED as a test-design/MEASUREMENT gap, NOT substrate-under-trained: GAP-A readiness PASSED (route_range 0.566, e2 pairwise_dist 0.164, C1 divergent) and BOTH levers ENGAGED (k 3/3, t_eff 3/3 -- the grading DID act); the near-tie concentration is itself a manifestation of the F-dominance MECH-439 asserts (F=88-89% of E3 variance, V3-EXQ-571), so a higher-P0 re-queue cannot open an ecology-pinned gap. REDESIGN: copy 689's 2x2 + 2 collapsed controls, ADD two GAP-BLIND controls -- ARM_FIXED_KMAX (k pinned k_max=6, gap-blind, Factor-A control) + ARM_FIXED_HOT_T (gap_scaled_alpha=0 + base T=2.5 -> T_eff=2.5 constant over the divergent e2_world_forward source, gap-blind Factor-B control; distinct from ARM_MATCHED_NOISE which keeps the COLLAPSED proposer source). LOAD-BEARING C_GAPBLIND (the C_FGAP replacement): ARM_A1B1 (gap-SCALED both levers) strict-above BOTH gap-blind controls on committed-action-class entropy on >=2/3 seeds = the lift is gap-CONCENTRATED (conflict-grading); a gap-blind control matching it = uniform lift, NOT conflict-grading (arm contrast sidesteps the uncomputable regression). C_PRIMARY (strict-above both collapsed controls) kept as the no-lift-at-all off-ramp discriminator. SECONDARY non-gating readouts: quantile-adaptive gap binning (equal-mass bins -> >=3 populated even on a concentrated gap) + the 689 fixed-width regression. READINESS DECOUPLED: 'levers engaged' (k/T_eff vary) is separated from 'gap-spread'; a levers-engaged + regression-uncomputable run reaches the arm contrast, NO LONGER self-routing substrate_not_ready on gap-spread. PRESERVED genuine non-vacuity gates (IN-ARM route-range floor, e2 pairwise-dist floor, levers-engaged k/T_eff-vary) -> below floor still self-routes substrate_not_ready_requeue (NEVER a false weakens). 3 seeds x 8 arms = 24 runs (P0=60 + P1=20 = 80 ep/run, 200 steps/ep). claim_ids=[MECH-439]; experiment_purpose=evidence. MECH-439 stays candidate -- a PASS moves toward supports; a preconditions-met fail routes to the synthesis-doc V4 directions / rank_preserving_F_to_eligibility_demotion fallback, NOT a dead end; NO weakens path. validate_experiments --strict --paths exit 0; dry-run smoke PASS (all 8 arms end-to-end, self-routes substrate_not_ready at dry scale by design). machine_affinity any (prefer cloud). NOTE (audit trail): queued under concurrent experiment_queue.json + parallel ree_core (SD-061 / q054-q056) untracked work; working-tree-vs-HEAD audit + post-commit dropped-file check applied per queue-experiment Step 5/8 (phase3-queue snapshot race); pathspec-limited to my script + the queue only.

items.title: SD-049 Phase-2 4-arm substrate-gradient behavioural validation (V3-EXQ-514l successor) on the foraging-competent 603n curriculum
items.note: The still-owed SD-049/SD-015 4-arm SUBSTRATE-GRADIENT validation (the 514n-t lineage forked to MECH-229/MECH-436; 514t tests MECH-436, NOT this). New number: 514 letter-exhausted through 514t. Per arm+seed, builds a fresh agent through the FULL scaffolded_sd054_onboarding 603n curriculum (Stage-0->Stage-0b->P0->Stage-H->P1->P2) -- the foraging-competence ceiling that sank 514j/k/l (~0.2% consumption, 23 vs 818 samples; failure_autopsy_V3-EXQ-514l) is lifted by the curriculum (603n PASS 2026-06-11; 514m reached n=3455 id samples / C_ID 0.926 / C_ANOVA F~1019 on it). 4 arms differ ONLY in SD-049 substrate richness via scaffold_cue_n_resource_types: ARM_0 OFF(single-resource) / ARM_1 2-type / ARM_2 3-type+novelty (PRIMARY) / ARM_3 5-type overshoot. Four pre-registered lifts: (C_GR) goal_resource_r as a NON-SATURATING identity-discrimination margin (same-type minus diff-type cosine of z_goal vs per-type mean z_resource), lift ARM_2-ARM_0>=0.4 -- fixes the 514l C5 defect where legacy cosine(z_goal,z_world) saturated ARM_0~1.0; (C_WL) object-bound wanting!=liking fraction via the SD-057 most-wanted(MECH-346)-vs-last-consumed read >=0.6 ARM_2 -- fixes the 514m vacuous C_WL=0.0 (legacy residue-valence channels never written), adopted from V3-EXQ-514n; (C_ANOVA) per-axis homeostatic drive one-way ANOVA F>4.605 ARM_2; (C_ID) z_resource identity-recovery linear probe >0.6 ARM_2. THREE non-vacuity self-route guards -> substrate_not_ready_requeue, NEVER a false weakens: R1 consumption (ARM_0 AND ARM_2 each >=2/3 seeds forage+consume above floor), R2 identity-probe-fireable (ARM_2 pooled id samples>=30), R3 WL-channel-fireable (514n same-statistic gate: leg-1 config-built positive-control separation==1.0 AND leg-2 ARM_2 bank populated>=2 tokens + >=5 scored WL events + drive spread). PER-CLAIM evidence_direction_per_claim: non-vacuity-unmet -> both non_contributory; else SD-015 supports iff C_ID&C_GR, SD-049 supports iff all four, partial->mixed (a WL-flat-only outcome is the SD-049 falsifier-branch substrate_conditional re-route candidate, NOT a standalone weakens -- route via /failure-autopsy). claim_ids=[SD-049,SD-015]; experiment_purpose=evidence. On PASS, governance reconciles pending_retest_after_substrate and SD-049+SD-015 drop out of the substrate-ceiling-lifted bucket; NO claim status changed by this run. Dry-run PASS end-to-end (both env modes; correct substrate_not_ready_requeue self-route at dry scale). machine any (prefer cloud). AUDIT: queued under concurrent experiment_queue.json writers (690/691/694 landed mid-session; original 692 number collided with the SD-061 readiness entry -> renumbered to 693); working-tree-vs-HEAD audit + post-commit dropped-file check applied per queue-experiment Step 5/8.
